code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut cur = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b <= 32
          if not string.is_empty(cur)
            match string.parse_int(cur)
            when Some(v)
              nums = list.push(nums, v)
            when None
              ()
            end
            cur = ""
          end
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end

    let total = nums.len()
    mut out = ""
    mut j = total - 1
    mut first = true
    while j >= 0
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j - 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
